common.noPermission: You don't have permission to use this command!
common.adminRequired: You need Administrator permission to use this command!

config.title: ⚙️ Server Configuration
config.description: Current bot settings for this server:
config.prefixInvalid:
❌ Please provide a valid prefix (1-5 characters)!
Example: `{prefix}config prefix !`
config.languageInvalid:
❌ Invalid language! Available languages: {languages}
Example: `{prefix}config language en`
config.welcomeChannelInvalid:
❌ Please mention a channel!
Example: `{prefix}config welcomechannel #welcome`
config.welcomeMessageInvalid:
❌ Please provide a welcome message!
Use {user} to mention the user
Example: `{prefix}config welcomemessage Welcome {user}!`
config.leaveChannelInvalid:
❌ Please mention a channel!
Example: `{prefix}config leavechannel #goodbye`
config.leaveMessageInvalid:
❌ Please provide a leave message!
Use {user} for the username
Example: `{prefix}config leavemessage Goodbye {user}!`
config.autoRoleInvalid:
❌ Please provide a role name!
Example: `{prefix}config autorole Member`
config.djRoleInvalid:
❌ Please provide a role name!
Example: `{prefix}config djrole DJ`
config.botWatcherRoleInvalid:
❌ Please provide a role name!
Example: `{prefix}config botwatcherrole Bot Watcher`

welcome.defaultMessage: 🎉 Welcome to the server, {user}! Enjoy your stay!
